_meta_notes: This is the default English locale and the template for new translations. To add a new language, copy this file, rename it to your BCP-47 language code (e.g. 'de.json' for German), set '_meta_language' to your language name, and replace each value with its translation.
LoginErrorTitle: We can't sign you in to Discord
HomeEnterPersonalMessage: Enter a personal message or a link you want to share
HomeNoItemsInCategory: There are no items in this category.
HomeBetaNoticeRC: This is a work-in-progress beta copy of Aerochat. Please stay updated with the GitHub page for the full release. You will be prompted to install the full release when it comes out.
HomeBetaNoticeDev:
Aerochat is currently early in development. Many features are currently unimplemented. You will probably not be able to daily drive it.

Please keep this in mind when reporting bugs.
ChatNoPermissionToTalk: You do not have permission to talk in this chat.
ChatInkMessage: Write and send messages in your handwriting
ChatLoadingChannelWait: This channel is loading. Please wait...
ChatNudgeSent: You have just sent a nudge.
ChatNoPermissionAction: You do not have permission to perform this action.
ChatMaxAttachments: You may only attach at most 10 files at a time.
ChatErrorUnauthorized: Unauthorized request. Please check your token and try again.
ChatErrorUnknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
ChatErrorServerError: This server is unavailable right now. Please try again later.
ChatToolbarBlockTooltip: Block this contact from seeing or contacting you
MessageNudgeSentYou: You have just sent a nudge.
MessageSystemNitroUpgradeTier1: {0} just boosted the server to level 1!
MessageSystemNitroUpgradeTier2: {0} just boosted the server to level 2!
MessageSystemNitroUpgradeTier3: {0} just boosted the server to level 3!
MessageSystemGuildDiscovery: This server has been added to Server Discovery.
ChangeSceneDescription: The people you chat with will see the scene and color scheme you choose.
CrashReportBody: Aerochat crashed. Here is the crash log:
CrashReportFailedParse: Failed to parse crash information. Sorry :(
CrashReportFailedGet: Failed to get crash information. Sorry :(
SettingLanguageRestartNote: Aerochat will restart when the language is changed.
SettingNotifyFriendOnline: Notify me when my friends come online
SettingNotifyDm: Notify me when I receive a direct message
SettingNotifyMention: Notify me when I am mentioned in a group chat or server
SettingNotifyChat: Play a notification when any new message has been sent in chat
SettingAutomaticallyOpenNotification: Open a new chat window whenever I get a DM
SettingReadMessageNotifications: Read message notifications with text to speech
SettingReadOnlineNotifications: Read online notifications with text to speech
SettingEnableMessageTts: Allow text-to-speech messages to be read aloud
SettingGoIdleWithFullscreenProgram: Make my status go "away" when I open a fullscreen application
SettingBasicTitlebar: Configure when to use the non-native basic titlebar fallback
SettingXPCaptionButtons: Use the Windows XP caption button theme in non-native titlebar
SettingHighlightMentions: Highlight messages that have mentioned you
SettingDisplayDiscordServerLink: Show the Aerochat Discord server link button on the home page
SettingDisplayHomeNews: Show news on the home page
SettingDisplayAds: Show community-submitted ads on the home page
SettingDisplayAerochatAttribution: Show the Aerochat link on the chat window
SettingDiscordDeveloperMode: Enable developer commands in context menus
SettingInputDeviceIndex: Input device [Requires rejoining if changed mid-call]
TitlebarAutomatic: Automatically determine based on my theme
